name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, late payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate accounts receivable instead of manual tracking of payments and invoices.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking customer payments and managing overdue invoices

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in tracking customer payments and managing overdue invoices

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of payments and invoices
